name: GitHub Actions OIDC for AWS
description: Configures secure, keyless authentication from GitHub Actions to AWS using OpenID Connect (OIDC). Eliminates the need for long-lived AWS access keys by creating an IAM OIDC identity provider and an assumable IAM role with configurable permissions and repository/branch restrictions.
architectureSummary: Creates an IAM OIDC identity provider for GitHub Actions (token.actions.githubusercontent.com), an IAM role with a trust policy scoped to a specific GitHub organization, repository, and branch, and attaches configurable managed IAM policies. The role can be assumed by GitHub Actions workflows using the aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials action.
securityNotes: Uses OIDC federation instead of long-lived access keys, following AWS security best practices. The trust policy restricts role assumption to a specific GitHub organization, repository, and optionally a branch. Session duration is configurable with a sensible default of 1 hour. Only managed policies are attached — no inline policies with overly broad permissions.

versions.changelog: Initial release with IAM OIDC provider, IAM role with GitHub Actions trust policy, and configurable managed policy attachments.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy IAM resources into. Note: IAM is global but the provider still requires a region.

inputs.name: github_org
inputs.label: GitHub Organization
inputs.description: The GitHub organization or user account name (e.g., my-company).

inputs.name: github_repo
inputs.label: GitHub Repository
inputs.description: The GitHub repository name (e.g., my-app). Used to scope the IAM trust policy.

inputs.name: github_branch
inputs.label: GitHub Branch
inputs.description: The Git branch to restrict role assumption to. Use '*' to allow any branch.

inputs.name: role_name
inputs.label: IAM Role Name
inputs.description: Custom name for the IAM role. If empty, a name will be generated from the project name.

inputs.name: policy_arns
inputs.label: IAM Policy ARNs
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of IAM managed policy ARNs to attach to the role.

inputs.name: max_session_duration
inputs.label: Max Session Duration
inputs.description: Maximum session duration in seconds for the IAM role (900-43200).

outputs.name: oidc_provider_arn
outputs.description: The ARN of the IAM OIDC identity provider.

outputs.name: role_arn
outputs.description: The ARN of the IAM role for GitHub Actions.

outputs.name: role_name
outputs.description: The name of the IAM role.

outputs.name: github_actions_config_snippet
outputs.description: A sample GitHub Actions workflow snippet for using the role.
